review_title: A reliable scraping backbone for multilingual market analysis
description: Our overall experience with ScrapingBee has been very positive. We use it as part of our outbound sales automation to scrape websites and extract practical signals like where traffic seems to come from and which languages a site is available in, and it has been consistently reliable. It removes a lot of the usual scraping headaches around proxies, blocks, and rendering, which means we can focus on using the data rather than fighting with the setup. It feels stable, well thought out, and easy to integrate, and it has scaled nicely as our usage has grown. It is not flashy, but it does exactly what it promises, which is honestly what you want from a scraping service.
author: Tina J.
pros: It is easy to use and has the features we needed to build our tool. Best price on market. Very reliable and easy to integrate, it saves us time by handling blocks and rendering so we can focus on the data.
cons: If I have to mention something it would be, that the documentation could be more detailed in some edge cases, and debugging failed requests sometimes requires a bit of trial and error.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: excellent. happily recommend to anyone. support is the best. hardly any down time. very low error rates. even with the lowest cost settings of render_js = false and using US data centers, i am able to get all the extraction i need.
author: Arvind K.
pros: good value. excellent support. i primarily use the scraping. i particularly like the extraction (css, xpath) feature, because with this extraction i dont have to do my own DOM.
cons: there is a learning curve. and documentation is bulky takes a day to a week to read through. they should have provided an AI feature on documentation which could build query / fetch requests. also they do not provide examples in javascript, which is what i use. the examples are in python, cURL etc.

description: Very good! Makes my life easier by scraping content on our projects.
author: Washington F.
pros: It’s reliable and we have filters to do searches from elements inside a page scrap, this is the best feature so far. Their premium proxy is also very good and makes that all scrap don’t get caught by any captcha or something like.
cons: Maybe if we have more plans options it would be great.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Buzz into the web with ScrapingBee
description: ScrapingBee is a great proxy service to use at scale for companies looking to ingest tons of web data
author: Eshwaran V.
pros: Request times, ease of integration, cost effective, ScrapingBee's customer relationship management and documentation.
cons: Lack of more structured responses for SERP API, and instead returning only HTML which requires further parsing
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Rock-solid web scraping that powers our production AI app
description: Very positive. ScrapingBee has been stable, predictable, and easy to integrate into a production Bubble app. It’s a foundational part of our AI workflow, and their support team has been responsive and genuinely helpful whenever we’ve had questions. It’s rare to find a tool that works this well and has a team that stands behind it.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: ScrapingBee has been extremely reliable in production and is a core piece of our Bubble app. It allows us to consistently scrape client websites, pass that data into our AI assistant, and generate highly customized outputs at scale. The API is straightforward, the results are clean, and it handles real-world sites far better than most alternatives we tested. On top of that, their support team is excellent—fast responses, clear explanations, and they went above and beyond to help us.
cons: Honestly very little. Like any scraping solution, you still need to think through usage limits as you scale, but that’s expected.

description: I’ve been using ScrapingBee for years, and it’s been an extremely reliable service throughout that time. The platform consistently delivers stable performance, handles anti-bot protections well, and requires very little maintenance once set up. Overall, it’s a dependable solution that I trust for long-term, production-level web scraping projects.
author: Nick S.
pros: What I liked most is how simple ScrapingBee is to use. The API is intuitive, documentation is clear, and I was able to start scraping production sites quickly without worrying about proxy setup or browser automation.
cons: The main downside is pricing, which can get expensive as usage scales. Credits are consumed quickly when using JavaScript rendering or advanced features, making it harder to justify for smaller projects or teams with unpredictable scraping volumes.

review_title: ScrapingBee lets you get more done faster
description: I’m an extremely satisfied customer of ScrapingBee. I’ve used the service for a dozen or so personal and private scraping projects big and small. ScrapingBee enables me to scrape more sites quicker, instead of focusing on coding around WAFs and rate limits.
author: Jason H.
pros: I like how easily I can get started scraping with ScrapingBee. Their basic proxy network is fantastic. I’ve had to use the JS rendering and the advanced proxy only once but it performed really well.
cons: I find the credit system fair but easy to misuse. I left on JS rendering when it didn’t need to be and ate through a bunch of credits. That was on me but it was easy to do, though their API explorer estimates credit usage well enough.

review_title: Scraping Bee really grew on us!
description: Very good so far, will continue using for a large project coming up as it just provides the consistency we need
author: Mark M.
pros: It just worked and worked consistently. We tried many different services before this (mostly a bit cheaper), but there was always something not quite working from rate limits to availability or being blocked. ScrapingBee has been consistently good. It was also really good that the 1000 credits are available to properly test
cons: There was something I didnt quite get about the website and dashboard - not 100% sure what it is - but it could be a bit 'clearer / cleaner'. Once I worked it our it is actually very good!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Very easy to use, reliable, fast and efficient! They reliably are not blocked, keep the IPs fresh and can handle very high volume.
cons: Not many cons I can think of, sometimes I wish there was rollover credits for months that have lower use.

description: Overall, great balance between price and value you get. Easy to plug in play to your workflows without lengthy setups/custom scrapers
author: Mikhail K.
pros: Super simple to set up. I dont have a massive experience with scrapers, but good documentation and user friendly interface made it very easy to get started
cons: Concurrencies are something to keep an eye on if you are using it in automated workflows. Would be great to get higher limits
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Jacob K.
pros: I set up ScrapingBee to rotate proxy IP addresses when scraping tens of thousands of pages from search engines and eCommerce websites. These are typically more difficult to scrape, but even the cheaper rotating proxies on ScrapingBee have rarely been blocked. If they are (occasionally) blocked, I only pay for successful returns, so I have not encountered any downside.
cons: I have only had one issue where ScrapingBee accidentally assigned proxies from the wrong country, rendering my html in a different language. But this was a brief issue and has never happened since.

review_title: Fantastic service: works flawlessly, best support I've experienced
description: Fantastically easy to use, allowed me to set up an automated scraper in hours.
author: Mike P.
pros: It just works: and its parsing meta-language is wonderfully powerful. Most importantly, the support I've received has been superlative: in my first attempt to implement a parser (using the meta-language) I failed, and a support engineer wrote the whole parser for me. Then I realised the scraping API was missing a really useful parameter: the support engineer updated the API to add the missing parameter (and generically so it supports all available parameters) within about 48 hours. It almost feels like Scraping Bee's support engineers are on my own team!
cons: Nothing missing for me. I can't think of any downsides.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Jinalkumar P.
pros: It’s very easy to use and provides consistently low latency for API calls. The support team is responsive and helpful whenever assistance is needed. Most importantly, our scraping requests aren’t getting blocked
cons: Honestly, I haven’t encountered anything I dislike so far. ScrapingBee has been reliable and met all our expectations.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Nathan R.
pros: Great tool, incredible customer service. Their documentation seems great and their support staff is responsive, competent, and helpful.
cons: Just wish there was a cheaper paid tier. Their documentation seems great and their support staff is responsive, competent, and helpful.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Powerful product, simple to use, clear docs
description: My first day I realized that this is the best I've been able to find so far and I don't even need anything extra, so I got the subscription instantly. Very satisfied so far.
author: Ches O.
pros: Simplicity of using the API and extremely clear docs.
cons: I think the UI could be more serious. My first impression not very professional. I don't know, probably it's just my opinion.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: After struggling with all kinds of proxy services, failed requests, etc I think I found a gem.
author: Jae Sung K.
pros: I no longer have to worry about having to figure out how to work around anti-bot measures so that I can focus on building my product.
cons: Startup plan should have more credits. Not sure about the exact credit usage.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Charles C.
pros: It was extremely quick to get up and running. We launched our MVP with scraping bee in just 2 weeks
cons: They had features that increased cost that we could not take advantage of

author: Mike C.
pros: I'm not even using the full features of ScrapingBee, but with their API Builder, Code Exporter, and Dashboarding, it was easy to get started.I see the features of ScrapingBee being huge for me in the near future, but I know that as I scale, they're pricing is competitive and their service is reliable. I haven't had this success rate, and this isn't my first webscraping vendor. I'm never going anywhere else.
cons: I would love a bit more documentation in the errors. I know that with scraping, it can be obscure, but I lost a bit of time on fine tuning the parameters of my request before it worked, but that it panned out faster than any other service I've worked with because of their built in Request Builder
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A great tool that saves us time
description: We love it and it's a major part of our tech stack
author: William S.
pros: IT does exactly what we want it to do and saves months of dev time dealing with generic issues (stealth proxy etc.)
cons: The 400 error responses could be more descriptive

review_title: Easy to setup and use, while being affordable
author: Adrian G.
pros: Easy to setup and use, while being affordable very value for money, especially relative to alternatives out there
cons: not much to be honest if i have to nitpick, it will be that there's not much info to a failed request which can make debugging an issue

author: Paul M.
pros: We use ScrapingBee for a raft of our tools, internal and external and it allows us to develop quickly without the need to get bogged down in complicated scraping code.
cons: Id love to see some features that allow API extraction of typically scraped items, like news author extraction etc

author: Christopher P.
pros: What I like about Scraping Bee is that I can use it to scrape whatever I need to scrape without getting blocked.
cons: I wish I had more money to spend on computing resources. Sometimes my scraping is constrained by my budget.

review_title: Scraping Bee - The Perfect Black Box Solution
description: We were looking for a Black Box solution that we could easily intergrate with our internet data collection system. We wanted to be able to send our HTTP requests to a service that could handle all of the security issues related to web data extraction, and then return the raw results of the HTTP request. The service has to be virtually invisable to our processes. Scraping Bee is the perfect Black Box solution. In addition to the ease of implementation we needed a highly reliable service with great technical support. Our data collection processes run 24/7 and Scraping Bee is a great partner. When a target site puts up significant challenges the support team always finds a soltion to keep us running.
author: Lonnie W.
pros: Scraping Bee is reliable and easily integrates with our systems. Great technical support!
cons: We have found no Cons with Scraping Bee.

author: Michael W.
pros: The website I scrape data from is constantly changing and hard to scrape the actual data, but ScrapingBee works. The customer service responds quickly and resolves the issue, usually, within the day.
cons: It is more expensive than the other service we use, but that service was not, immediately, able to scrape the website we wanted scraped.

author: Tomer B.
pros: The success rate is 95%+ Super responsive support
cons: Support chat could be better Headers forwarding can be annoying
